summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HRMS MVP with 8 core modules. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), but frontend has critical HTML structure issues with table components.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML hydration errors - invalid nesting of div elements inside table elements (thead, tbody, tr, th, td)
Options not visible/clickable in employee form
Mobile menu button not found on desktop view

integration_issues.issue: Form submission blocked by dropdown selection issues

passed_tests: All 8 module navigation (Dashboard, Employees, Attendance, Leaves, Recruitment, Onboarding, Payroll, Performance)
All backend CRUD operations (22/22 API endpoints)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical HTML structure issues in Shadcn UI table components. The current implementation generates invalid HTML with div elements nested inside table elements, causing hydration errors. Also fix select dropdown visibility issues in forms.

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (navigation and basic UI working, but forms and tables have critical issues)
